task.name: Beads Context Recovery
task.description: Recover working context from Beads issue tracker when conversation history is unavailable (after compact, new session, or agent handoff).

when-to-use.trigger: Session start without clear context of what to work on
After context compact when previous work state is unclear
Agent handoff when taking over from another agent
User asks "what was I working on?" or "continue from last session"

prerequisites.check: Beads initialized: Check for .beads/ directory in project root

check.output:
Beads CLI not found. To install: ```bash curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/steveyegge/beads/main/scripts/install.sh | bash ```
After installation, initialize in project: ```bash bd init --prefix bmad ```
check.action: HALT - Cannot recover context without Beads

check.output: Beads not initialized in this project. Run: bd init --prefix bmad
check.action: HALT - No Beads database to query

check.output:
No tasks in progress or ready.
**Options:** 1. Check sprint-status.yaml for story assignments 2. Run sprint-status workflow to see current state 3. Create new tasks with: bd create "Task description" -t task -p 1

step.goal: Load full context of current task
step.action: Parse task_details for: - title: Task name - status: Current status - priority: P0-P4 - parent: Parent story/epic ID - notes: Detailed progress notes

check.action: Extract BMAD file path from notes
Read the referenced BMAD story/epic file

step.action: Extract from notes: - COMPLETED: What has been done - IN_PROGRESS: What was being worked on - NEXT: What should be done next - FILES_CHANGED: List of modified files - KEY_DECISIONS: Important decisions made - BLOCKERS: Any blocking issues

check.action: For each file in FILES_CHANGED: - Verify file exists - Note which files to review
Read BMAD story file for full acceptance criteria and task list
Cross-reference Beads progress with story checkboxes

notes.note: This task complements the standard BMAD workflow
Use Beads for quick queries, BMAD story files for full requirements
Always update both Beads AND story file when completing tasks
Write notes as if explaining to a future agent with zero context

issue.problem: Beads and story file out of sync
issue.solution: Run beads-sync workflow to reconcile differences
Check story file's Dev Agent Record section for context

issue.problem: Task in Beads not found in story
issue.solution: May be discovered work - check if task has "discovered-from" dependency
